Create example CLAUDE.md with placeholder project context showing the expected format for clippy workspace configuration
Create example Output directory structure with README explaining expected artifacts (ADR/, summaries, tech.md)

Add documentation validation test in tests/docs.bats: verify README.md exists and is non-empty, contains required sections (Installation, Usage, Architecture, Agents), example workspace files exist and are valid JSON where applicable
